data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'shape-invariant enforcement so only correct selector payload is present', but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this enforcement, yet there are no concrete validations or checks performed to demonstrate that the implementation meets this requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or functionality of 'shape-invariant enforcement so only correct selector payload is present'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
